description:
While sports day continues to roll along, will the club be able to pull off Shinobu`s proxy confession event?
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Dare no Koe ka Wakaranai / Yamabuki Arisu-kun Desu / Flyby Anomaly
I Can`t Tell Whose Voice It Was / Yamabuki Arisu-kun / Flyby Anomaly
誰の声かわからない / 山吹有栖君です / フライバイ・アノマリー
